title: 5.9FT Artificial Christmas Garland String Lights with 162 Snowy Red Berries 55 Green Leaves 20 LED Lights Battery Operated for Xmas Mantle Indoor Outdoor Holiday Christmas Thanksgiving Decoration
features: 【Easy to Decor】: Just push out the battery case cover and install 2*AA batteries (not included), Then turn on the switch, it will light up. You can wrap it around your Christmas tree, hang it on a door frame and wall, or rotate along the mantel, table or windows.

【Delicate Lifelike Red Berry Garland】: This 5.9FT artificial rustic garland string lights is combined with traditional classic festive elements. 20 warm white LED lights, 162 lifelike red berries decorated with shining snowy, 55 natural green leaves. It makes you feel like you are in the embrace of nature!

【Long Life & Environmental Friendly Materials】: The red berries is made of lightweight foam ball, The garland stems and green leaves are made of plastic. It is environmentally friendly, not easy to fade, sturdy enough to last in storage and decorating for years to come.

【Festival & Romantic Atmosphere】: This snowy red berry Xmas garland is visually appealing when they are on as well as when they are off, perfect for Christmas, Thanksgiving, Farmhouse banister decor. It can add a chic, fresh touch to your home, create a wonderland winter festival for you and your family!
【You will Receive】: 1 pack red berry garland string lights with battery case (battery not included) + Worry free after-sales service and with 90 days return policy warranty.
description: Product Description This artificial garland string lights is combined with traditional, classic and festive Xmas elements. 162 lifelike red berries decorated with shining snowy, 55 natural green leaves. With 20 warm white LED lights. It is visually appealing, which can add a chic, fresh touch to your home, create a wonderland winter festival for you and your family! Product Features - Vivid snowy red berry and green leaves makes you feel like being in nature! - Non-allergenic materials: snowy Red berries (lightweight foam ball); Green leaves or branches (plastic). - Perfect for wrapping it around your Christmas tree, hanging it on a door frame and wall, or rotating along the mantel, fireplace, table or farmhouse banister decor etc. - Not easy to fade, sturdy enough to last in storage and decorating for years to come. Suit for daily decoration or any holiday, important days in your life! Product Details 162 lifelike red berries decorated with shining snowy 55 natural green leaves. 5.9FT artificial rustic garland string lights Operated by 3*AA batteries Pairs well with any colors Xmas ornaments - If you are fancy in classic and festival Christmas style, this fantastic garland would be your first choice for decorating your home! You Will Receive: - 1* Christmas garlands with 1 battery case Product Details Product Details - Size: 5.9 FT - 20 warm LED lights - 162 lifelike red berries - 55 natural green leaves - Materials: lightweight foam ball + plastic - Battery operated: 2* AA batteries (not include) Add a chic, fresh touch to your home, create a wonderland winter festival for your family!

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: This product should be kept away from open flames or heat sources. Treat the LED lights carefully to avoid damage. Small parts such as the red berries can pose a choking hazard for young children.
